summary: Extract WorkbenchStore security audit persistence into a focused BFF store module.
rationale: WorkbenchStore is a red-zone BFF persistence boundary. This PR preserves the public audit facade while moving security audit SQL, redaction, and row mapping into a narrower store module.
verification: uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_workbench_store_decoupling.py tests/test_workbench_security_audit.py tests/test_workbench_auth_security.py -q
